phenomenon.title: Counterintuitive aggregation
phenomenon.body: Growth intensity remains attached to risky, water-linked cells.

structure.title: Low-redundancy branch
structure.body: Elongated substructures concentrate on edge-like paths with weak substitutes.

mechanism.title: Guidance + protection
mechanism.body: River alignment and protection can jointly steer settlement persistence.

consequence.title: Exposure hotspot
consequence.body: Hazard and constrained growth overlap on the thinnest developed edges.

whatIsRccu.title: Prototype corridor
whatIsRccu.body: A compact, water-coupled prototype rather than ordinary diffuse expansion.

prdTimeline.title: Emergence path
prdTimeline.body: Thin chains appear first and later thicken along constrained axes.

prototypeObjects.title: Core object
prototypeObjects.body: High coupling, elongated form, and distinct separation from compact city cores.

waterGuidance.title: Guidance sensitivity
waterGuidance.body: Weaker water guidance broadens the geometry and reduces object confidence.
